transition_log.note: Created @adhd/agent-tool-registry: project.json (tags:["layer:ai","platform:node"], @nx/js:tsc build + drizzle asset glob), tsconfig.json+tsconfig.lib.json, package.json (better-sqlite3@12.10.0, drizzle-orm@0.45.2, zod@4.4.3), src/db/client.ts (WAL), src/db/migrate-runner.ts (FK-safe), src/db/migrate.ts, src/db/schema.ts (type import only, no tables), src/index.ts (barrel), drizzle/meta/_journal.json (empty). tsconfig.base.json path already registered. nx build agent-tool-registry exit 0. commit 3a39b1c.

Added tool_types text-PK lookup table + tools table + ToolStore with create/read/list. Generated drizzle migration 0000_dry_roulette.sql. 13 tests pass on real on-disk SQLite including 3x [inv:reopen-proves-persistence] close+reopen assertions. Added vite.config.ts + explicit @nx/vite:test target to handle --testFile routing (vitest 1.6.0 requires executor, not plugin passthrough). Guard: npx nx test agent-tool-registry --testFile=... exit 0. Commit: f7fec21

Added platforms + tool_platform_bindings tables to schema.ts; generated migration 0001_gray_talkback.sql via drizzle-kit; implemented BindingStore with seedPlatform, readPlatform, listPlatforms, createBinding, listForPlatform, resolve; exported all from index.ts; 15 tests pass including [inv:reopen-proves-persistence] close+reopen and [dod.1] negative-control; guard exit 0; commit 6e7c0771b10e131a27a108958a85f064eb49ed27

Added mcp_servers table to schema.ts (transport text, providedToolIds json, configSchema json), McpServerStore with create/read/list + typed errors, drizzle migration 0002_aberrant_blink.sql generated, 12-test suite including 3 inv:reopen-proves-persistence tests proving JSON column round-trip after close+reopen. Guard exit code: 0.

Added agent_tools junction table (agent_slug LOGICAL ref, no cross-pkg FK; tool_name → tools.name real FK). Implemented AgentToolStore with grant/listForAgent/revoke. Generated drizzle migration 0003_foamy_otto_octavius.sql. 10 tests: persistence close+reopen, permission verbatim, no-FK agent_slug, context_condition JSON round-trip. Guard exit 0. Commit d8d1833.

audit-schema gate: python3 audit_tool_registry.py --phase schema => 16/16 PASS (exit 0), verified by orchestrator. Schema phase complete: tool_types/tools/platforms/tool_platform_bindings/mcp_servers/agent_tools all present; no-cross-pkg-FK + lookup-not-enum invariants hold.

dod_provenance.note: DoD derived from docs/plan/agent-registry spec; confirmed by team-lead plan-authoring task 2026-06-22
